svg.text: Rev 0.5 · 2026-05-08 · Nair (Electronics) · +Mag · ESP32-S3 · Buck dig. rail · 2200 mAh (24h) / ext. pack (50h) · Preliminary
PATIENT PROTECTION — All electrode lines · Current-limiting resistors · TVS diodes · Defibrillation protection · IEC 60601-1
E1–E5: 10kΩ series + bidirectional TVS · E6–E7: 47kΩ series (SCL low current path)
OTA via HTTPS / BLE DFU / USB OTG
to SCL. No spare ADC ch. remain.
